name: No-Frost Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the baking soda to the chopped dates.
2. Pour the hot water over the dates.
3. Cream the sugar and shortening together.
4. Add the date mixture to the creamed sugar and shortening, mixing well.
5. Mix in the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients (flour, cocoa, salt).
6. Pour the batter into a 9" x 13" pan.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips and chopped nuts on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes.
